notes: HAR-267 captured Admin GraphQL 2026-04 API-created webhook subscription empty catalog/count reads, unknown detail null behavior, create/update/delete lifecycle payloads, detail read-after-create/update/delete, missing URI validation, and unknown-id update/delete userErrors. HAR-268 adds local read support and HAR-269 adds local create/update staging for the captured Admin API-created HTTP URI subset; webhookSubscriptionDelete remains unimplemented until local deregistration behavior is modeled. The capture explicitly excludes app TOML webhooks and does not trigger webhook deliveries.
